metadata.description: Design mobile app UI in plain HTML instead of Figma — an ongoing design workflow: build a per-project design system, then create, extend, restyle, and iterate on phone-frame mockup screens with live WCAG contrast auditing.

plugins.name: mobile-mockups
plugins.description: Continuous mobile UI design in plain HTML: create a per-project design system (semantic CSS custom properties, type roles, WCAG contrast audit), compose phone-frame mockup screens, then keep working — add screens, update flows, restyle, screenshot, critique, and iterate directly in the browser.
